    • services/api/userService
    • UserService

    Variable UserServiceConst

    UserService: {
        deleteAccount(): Promise<boolean>;
        getAvatarOfUser(): Promise<string>;
        getLast5ModifiedEventsOfUser(): Promise<CalendarEventDTO[]>;
        getLast5ModifiedNotesOfUser(): Promise<Note[]>;
        getLast5ModifiedTodosOfUser(): Promise<TodoEntryDTO[]>;
        getRelatedUsers(): Promise<any>;
        getUserAccountInfo(): Promise<any>;
        getUserAccountInfoWithID(userID: string): Promise<any>;
        getUserPreviewWithID(userID: string): Promise<any>;
        getUserProfile(): Promise<any>;
        getUserProfileWithID(userID: string): Promise<any>;
        saveAccountInfo(data: SaveAccountInfoRequest): Promise<any>;
        saveUserAvatar(file: File): Promise<string>;
        saveUserProfile(data: SaveUserProfileRequest): Promise<any>;
        searchAvailableUsersForWorkspace(
            workspaceID: string,
            query: string,
        ): Promise<any>;
        searchUsers(query: string): Promise<any>;
    } = ...

    Client for the user endpoints: profile/account/avatar management, lookups by ID, recent activity, related users and user search. Methods throw on a non-OK response.

    Type Declaration

    • deleteAccount: function
      • deleteAccount(): Promise<boolean>

        Soft-deletes the current user's account.

        Returns Promise<boolean>

        true on success.

        • Defined in services/api/userService.ts:72
    • getAvatarOfUser: function
      • getAvatarOfUser(): Promise<string>

        Returns the current user's avatar URL.

        Returns Promise<string>

        The avatar URL.

        • Defined in services/api/userService.ts:157
    • getLast5ModifiedEventsOfUser: function
      • getLast5ModifiedEventsOfUser(): Promise<CalendarEventDTO[]>

        Returns the current user's 5 most recently modified events.

        Returns Promise<CalendarEventDTO[]>

        Up to 5 events, newest first.

        • Defined in services/api/userService.ts:263
    • getLast5ModifiedNotesOfUser: function
      • getLast5ModifiedNotesOfUser(): Promise<Note[]>

        Returns the current user's 5 most recently modified notes.

        Returns Promise<Note[]>

        Up to 5 notes, newest first.

        • Defined in services/api/userService.ts:280
    • getLast5ModifiedTodosOfUser: function
      • getLast5ModifiedTodosOfUser(): Promise<TodoEntryDTO[]>

        Returns the current user's 5 most recently modified todo entries.

        Returns Promise<TodoEntryDTO[]>

        Up to 5 todo entries, newest first.

        • Defined in services/api/userService.ts:246
    • getRelatedUsers: function
      • getRelatedUsers(): Promise<any>

        Returns the users that share at least one workspace with the current user.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The list of related users.

        • Defined in services/api/userService.ts:228
    • getUserAccountInfo: function
      • getUserAccountInfo(): Promise<any>

        Returns the current user's own account info.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The account info.

        • Defined in services/api/userService.ts:140
    • getUserAccountInfoWithID: function
      • getUserAccountInfoWithID(userID: string): Promise<any>

        Returns the account info of a specific user.

        Parameters

        • userID: string

          The user to look up.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The account info.

        • Defined in services/api/userService.ts:194
    • getUserPreviewWithID: function
      • getUserPreviewWithID(userID: string): Promise<any>

        Returns a compact preview of a specific user, with live presence.

        Parameters

        • userID: string

          The user to look up.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The user preview.

        • Defined in services/api/userService.ts:212
    • getUserProfile: function
      • getUserProfile(): Promise<any>

        Returns the current user's own profile.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The profile.

        • Defined in services/api/userService.ts:123
    • getUserProfileWithID: function
      • getUserProfileWithID(userID: string): Promise<any>

        Returns the public profile of a specific user.

        Parameters

        • userID: string

          The user to look up.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The profile.

        • Defined in services/api/userService.ts:176
    • saveAccountInfo: function
      • saveAccountInfo(data: SaveAccountInfoRequest): Promise<any>

        Updates the current user's account info (name, e-mail).

        Parameters

        • data: SaveAccountInfoRequest

          The account fields to change.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The updated account info.

        • Defined in services/api/userService.ts:51
    • saveUserAvatar: function
      • saveUserAvatar(file: File): Promise<string>

        Uploads a new avatar image for the current user (multipart upload with CSRF header).

        Parameters

        • file: File

          The image file to upload.

        Returns Promise<string>

        The stored avatar URL.

        • Defined in services/api/userService.ts:90
    • saveUserProfile: function
      • saveUserProfile(data: SaveUserProfileRequest): Promise<any>

        Updates the current user's profile (display name, avatar URL, bio).

        Parameters

        • data: SaveUserProfileRequest

          The profile fields to change.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The updated profile.

        • Defined in services/api/userService.ts:29
    • searchAvailableUsersForWorkspace: function
      • searchAvailableUsersForWorkspace(
            workspaceID: string,
            query: string,
        ): Promise<any>

        Searches users who can still be added to a workspace (excludes the current user and existing members).

        Parameters

        • workspaceID: string

          The workspace to find addable users for.

        • query: string

          The search term.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The addable users.

        • Defined in services/api/userService.ts:327
    • searchUsers: function
      • searchUsers(query: string): Promise<any>

        Searches users by display name, username or e-mail (excludes the current user).

        Parameters

        • query: string

          The search term.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The matching users, with live presence.

        • Defined in services/api/userService.ts:302
